Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Element.Models.AssignTo

Model to define who to assign the element to If both PersonIds and GroupIds are empty, permissions remain unchanged.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
ParticipantIds

List of PersonIds to assign the element to.

 Collection of integer

None.
GroupIds

List of GroupIds to assign the element to.

 Collection of integer

None.
